# Test Document

This is a test markdown file for e2e testing with Playwright. It verifies the full annotation workflow, including text selection, comment creation, and highlight rendering.

## Blockquotes

> This is a blockquote for testing annotation within quoted text.
> It spans multiple lines to verify cross-line selection.

## Code Example

```javascript
const hello = "world";
console.log(hello);
```

## Final Section

This is the last paragraph in our test document. It contains
enough text to allow for meaningful annotation testing.
